---
title: "Analyze Maunaloa CO2 Data"
author: "Nyah Noronha"
format: html
execute: 
  echo: false
  message: false
  warning: false
---

## Analysis

This analysis will look at the CO2 Data from Maunaloa

```{r}
#| label: load-packages-and-data

# load packages
library("dplyr")
library("ggplot2")

# load data
mlo_data <- read.csv("data/monthly_in_situ_co2_mlo_cleaned.csv")
```

now that the data are loaded, lets make a plot. 

```{r}
#| label: plot-co2

# make the plot
mlo_data %>%
  filter(CO2 > 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Date.1,
             y = CO2)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title = "CO2 concentration at MLO over time",
       x = "Year",
       y = "Carbon Dioxide Concentration")
```
